results.name: Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.preamble:
File: CBCUS01C.cbl
Program: CBCUS01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print customer data file.
Paragraph: Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS (lines 161-178)
References: COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS in CBCUS01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y.
results.content:
Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS.
           IF  IO-STATUS NOT NUMERIC
           OR  IO-STAT1 = '9'
               MOVE IO-STAT1 TO IO-STATUS-04(1:1)
               MOVE 0        TO TWO-BYTES-BINARY
               MOVE IO-STAT2 TO TWO-BYTES-RIGHT
               MOVE TWO-BYTES-BINARY TO IO-STATUS-0403
               DISPLAY 'FILE STATUS IS: NNNN' IO-STATUS-04 
           ELSE
               MOVE '0000' TO IO-STATUS-04
               MOVE IO-STATUS TO IO-STATUS-04(3:2)
               DISPLAY 'FILE STATUS IS: NNNN' IO-STATUS-04 
           END-IF
           EXIT.

      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v2.0-25-gdb72e6b-235 Date: 2025-04-29 11:01:28 CDT
      *

results.name: 9000-CUSTFILE-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBCUS01C.cbl
Program: CBCUS01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print customer data file.
Paragraph: 9000-CUSTFILE-CLOSE (lines 136-153)
References: COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 9000-CUSTFILE-CLOSE in CBCUS01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y. invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9000-CUSTFILE-CLOSE.
           ADD 8 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT.
           CLOSE CUSTFILE-FILE
           IF  CUSTFILE-STATUS = '00'
               SUBTRACT APPL-RESULT FROM APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               ADD 12 TO ZERO GIVING APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING CUSTOMER FILE'
               MOVE CUSTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.

results.name: 0000-CUSTFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBCUS01C.cbl
Program: CBCUS01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print customer data file.
Paragraph: 0000-CUSTFILE-OPEN (lines 118-135)
References: COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
results.summary: paragraph 0000-CUSTFILE-OPEN in CBCUS01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y. invokes: PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM, PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-CUSTFILE-OPEN.
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.
           OPEN INPUT CUSTFILE-FILE
           IF  CUSTFILE-STATUS = '00'
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT
           END-IF
           IF  APPL-AOK
               CONTINUE
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING CUSTFILE'
               MOVE CUSTFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS
               PERFORM Z-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           EXIT.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
